task_completion.description: Verify that a new 'Activity' log is being created in farmOS Field Kit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should show the farmOS Field Kit interface with an indicator that an 'Activity' log is being added (e.g., header says 'Add Activity' or 'Activity log').

task_completion.description: Verify the date is set to February 14, 2025.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date input field or date picker clearly showing '2025-02-14', '02/14/2025', or 'February 14, 2025'.

task_completion.description: Verify the notes field contains the exact required text about the inoculation event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text area or notes field containing the text: 'Inoculated red oak logs with Shiitake strain LE-46. Used sawdust spawn with thumb-style brass inoculator. Sealed with cheese wax. Logs stacked in crib formation under the pine canopy for the spawn run.'

task_completion.description: Verify the first quantity is recorded correctly for the logs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A quantity input section showing the value '50', the label/measure 'logs inoculated', and the unit 'count'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second quantity is recorded correctly for the spawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A quantity input section showing the value '5.5', the label/measure 'sawdust spawn used', and the unit 'lbs'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual farmOS Field Kit application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI must match a web browser or PWA interface for farmOS Field Kit, displaying standard agricultural logging fields, rather than a generic text editor, notepad, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows, curl commands, or python scripts making API calls to farmOS in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Ensure the data is entered into the correct, distinct form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The date, notes, and the two separate quantities (with their respective labels and units) must be populated in their specific, separate input fields within the farmOS form, not pasted as a single block of text into one field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: farmOS Field Kit is a real agricultural app that supports 'Activity' logs. The target date for the log is exactly 2025-02-14. The required notes must mention Shiitake strain LE-46, red oak logs, sawdust spawn, cheese wax, and crib formation (all verified real-world mushroom cultivation terms). Quantity 1 must be exactly 50 'logs inoculated' with the unit 'count'. Quantity 2 must be exactly 5.5 'sawdust spawn used' with the unit 'lbs'.
